items.claim: Xiao Long was outperforming Cody Garbrandt in their previous fight before a point deduction hurt his standing.
items.quote: he was out outperforming Garbrand in that one.

items.claim: Adrien Giannes is doubling Cody Garbrandt in striking activity.
items.quote: Giannis is just doubling him up in in activity.

items.claim: Gable Stevenson has elite wrestling credentials.
items.quote: he's got all the accolades in wrestling

items.claim: Elijah Ellison has a low striking output of 1.6 significant strikes per minute.
Robert Whitaker will be stronger at light heavyweight because he does not have to cut weight.
items.quote: He's going to be stronger. He's taking some time off here.

items.claim: Robert Whitaker is coming off a layoff of nearly 12 months.
items.quote: his last fight was in July of 2025, so this fight will almost be just shy of 12 months

items.claim: King Green has a 72% takedown defense rate.
Terrence McKini has not been out of the first round in his last seven fights.
items.quote: this guy hasn't been out of the first round in man about seven fights.

items.claim: Terrence McKini will utilize his wrestling and ground and pound to beat King Green.
items.quote: I think Terrence McKenna is going to land takedowns at some point and utilize the ground and pound.

items.claim: Brandon Royval has a 45% takedown defense rate.
items.quote: Roy Val's got a 45% takedown defense

items.claim: Loner Kavanagh has a 94% takedown defense rate.
